pages.text: An exceptional ingredient obtained by hunting bear-like creatures.$(br)Confers to the consumer:$(br)$(li)2 minutes of Fury$(li)5 minutes of Saturation$(li)20 seconds of Poison$(li)10 seconds of Nausea

A thick and greasy segment from the forelimb of a large wild animal.$(br)Though it appears substantial, that is no reason to consume it raw—the saliva or other substances between the claws are foul enough to knock someone out.$(br)It only becomes a delicious food after proper processing.
